Should there be rain in any one of the asterisms, viz. Hasta,
Purvasadha, Mrgasiras, Citra, RevaU and Dhanistha, the quantity
of rainfall in the season would be 16 Dronas; in Satabhisaj, Jyes-
tha and Svati, it would be 4 Dronas; in Krttika, 10 Dronas; in
Sravana, Maghs, Anuradha, BharanS and Mula, 14 Dronas; in
Purvaphalguns, 25 Dronas; in Punarvasu, 20 Dronas; in Visakha
and Uttara$adha, 20 Dronas; in Asleaa, 13 Dronas; in Uttarabhadra,
Uttaraphalguni and Rohini, 25 Dropas; in Purvabhadra and Pusya,
15 Dronas; in A§vinS, 12 Dronas; and Ardra, 18 Dronas. These
quantities should be predicted, provided the concerned lunar man-
sions are not hurt in any way.
[In this section the author gives the amount of rainfall to be
predicted for the season on the basis of rain in the several asterisms
